description: Validate a manuscript PDF against a venue's formatting requirements (page-count limit, margins, fonts) and write a validation report. Page count and font checks use pdfinfo/pdffonts when available.
rules: read-only — inspects the PDF, never modifies it
pure Python stdlib for orchestration; pdfinfo/pdffonts (poppler-utils) are optional helpers
degrades gracefully — checks needing absent helpers are skipped, not failed
VENUE must be one of the known keys (nature, neurips, plos_one, nsf, nih)
report written to record_store as validation_report.txt
usage: Set PDF_FILE (path to the manuscript) and VENUE (e.g. Nature, NeurIPS, NSF). Optionally set CHECKS (comma-separated: page-count, margins, fonts, all). Output: validation_report.txt.
limitation: Margin checking is informational only (PDF margins are not parsed). Page-count and font checks require poppler-utils (pdfinfo/pdffonts) on PATH; without them those checks are skipped.
